channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Armed forces minister called for ‘new way of governing’ in resignation letter to Starmer – UK politics live
item.description: Armed forces minister called for ‘new way of governing’ in resignation letter to Starmer – UK politics live

item.title: i Politics: 'Skip a generation': Ex-Commando Al Carns emerges as Labour's plan B for PM
item.description: 'Skip a generation': Ex-Commando Al Carns emerges as Labour's plan B for PM

item.title: The Guardian: Left, right and centre – I see all strands of the Labour tribe pulling together in Makerfield. This is bigger than Burnham - The Guardian
item.description: Left, right and centre – I see all strands of the Labour tribe pulling together in Makerfield. This is bigger than Burnham - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: UK ex-security adviser warns defence plan is ‘dead in the water’ after new minister appointed
item.description: Starmer latest: UK ex-security adviser warns defence plan is ‘dead in the water’ after new minister appointed

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Could Starmer resign and who are the top contenders to replace him as prime minister?
item.description: Could Starmer resign and who are the top contenders to replace him as prime minister?

item.title: BBC Politics: PM needs to make 'bold' decisions on defence spending, says Carns
item.description: PM needs to make 'bold' decisions on defence spending, says Carns

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Death by a thousand consultations – @marthadacombe.bsky.social writes on how procrastination became the the defining feature of Starmer's premiership. www.arguably.uk/p/death-by-a...
item.description: Death by a thousand consultations – @marthadacombe.bsky.social writes on how procrastination became the the defining feature of Starmer's premiership. www.arguably.uk/p/death-by-a...

item.title: Novara Media: John Healey Quit to Send a Message to Britain’s Next Prime Minister
item.description: John Healey Quit to Send a Message to Britain’s Next Prime Minister

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Today's Inside Politics: some brief thoughts from me about the resignations that hit Keir Starmer's government yesterday, and a very interesting bit from @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social on the joke that ruined the Burnham-...
item.description: Today's Inside Politics: some brief thoughts from me about the resignations that hit Keir Starmer's government yesterday, and a very interesting bit from @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social on the joke that ruined the Burnham-...

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Yep @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social's Friday pieces on Burnham in Stephen's newsletter have been consistently excellent and insightful.
item.description: Yep @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social's Friday pieces on Burnham in Stephen's newsletter have been consistently excellent and insightful.
